title: Theodorea subulata
taxonomy: Theodorea subulata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. More specifically, it is placed in the genus Theodorea, which is a small group of flowering plants. Theodorea subulata is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the Asparagaceae family, Theodorea subulata is also related to other species such as Agapanthus and Hyacinthoides. Its classification may be subject to revision as new research emerges.
